multiCurrency.title: Multi-Currency Transaction
multiCurrency.expenseDescription: Since you're spending in {{currency}} but your account is in {{accountCurrency}}, you can specify the exact amount debited from your account (including taxes/fees).
multiCurrency.incomeDescription: Since you're receiving in {{currency}} but your account is in {{accountCurrency}}, you can specify the exact amount credited to your account.
multiCurrency.amountDebitedPlaceholder: e.g. How many {{currency}} are actually charged
multiCurrency.amountCreditedPlaceholder: e.g. How many {{currency}} are actually credited
multiCurrency.helperText: Optional: The system will calculate the effective exchange rate automatically
multiCurrency.expenseExample: Example: If you spend USD 20 on Netflix and are charged ARS 31,500 (including 75% "dólar tarjeta" tax), enter 31500 here. The system will calculate the effective rate: 1575 ARS/USD.
multiCurrency.incomeExample: Example: If you receive USD 500 for freelance work and get ARS 787,500 credited (after fees/taxes), enter 787500 here. The system will calculate the effective rate: 1575 ARS/USD.

recurrence.dayOfMonthHelper: For months with fewer days, the last day of the month will be used
recurrence.yearlyTip: 💡 Tip: For yearly recurrence, the month is taken from the start date below. Example: Start date = Jan 15 → Repeats every January 15th.
recurrence.occurrencesHelper: Alternative to end date - limit total number of occurrences
